name: Peanut Brittle- Micro
recipeInstructions:
1. Use a 4-cup Pyrex measuring cup and a short-handled wooden spoon. Leave these in the pot while cooking.
2. Mix the syrup and sugar thoroughly.
3. Microwave on high power for 4 minutes.
4. Add peanuts and microwave for an additional 3-5 minutes, or until light brown (usually at least 4 minutes total). Watch carefully to avoid burning.
5. Remove from the microwave and add vanilla and butter. Microwave for another half to one minute, or until the mixture is no longer hot.
6. Sprinkle baking soda over the mixture and stir well. This will create a foamy texture.
7. Pour the brittle onto a Teflon pan or a well-greased cooking sheet and spread it very thin.
8. Allow to cool completely before breaking into pieces.
